name: Christmas Bu#uelos
recipeInstructions:
1. Sift all dry ingredients together.
2. Slowly add water and a little oil. Mix until combined.
3. Turn dough onto a lightly floured board.
4. Knead the dough until it is smooth and elastic.
5. Divide into about 40 small balls.
6. Roll out each ball into approximately 4 to 6 inch circles.
7. Fry in very hot, deep oil until delicately browned on both sides.
8. Drain on paper towels.
9. Sprinkle with cinnamon and sugar mixture.
